query:
SELECT ae.id, ae.toEmail, ae.subject, ae.triggerKey, ae.sentAt, ae.status
FROM agent_emails ae
JOIN users u ON u.id = ae.userId
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Griffith%' OR ae.toEmail LIKE '%griffith%' OR ae.toEmail LIKE '%adam%'
ORDER BY ae.sentAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
